caption: A man wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt with suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, stylized wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned to his left. The background features a wall decorated with several framed photographs and a garment rack with clothing, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" printed on it. To the left and right of the man, on-screen logos appear; the one on the left reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a microphone icon, while the one on the right reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains seated in the same position, subtly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks, while the camera and lighting remain stationary.
